enriched_points.expanded_content: Key metrics include mortality rates, length of stay, and patient safety indicators, providing a comprehensive assessment of tele-ICU effectiveness.
Studies show significant reductions in ICU mortality, with rates falling from 7.9% pre-tele-ICU to 3.8% post-implementation, indicating improved patient outcomes.
Tele-ICU implementation correlates with reduced length of stay, enhancing resource utilization and allowing for quicker patient turnover in critical care.
Monitoring safety indicators post-tele-ICU highlights improvements in patient care, including fewer preventable complications and adverse events during critical care.
